changelog:
- marked formatting
- title in tables
- closing latex editor applies change
- support moving math block and selection on long press
- fix underline/strike/marked applied on header changes text size
- clear text field on empty rich draft, apply draft/clear before closing animation
- show table menu over keyboard for more space
- fixed infinite loading on opening photo from rich message
- fix losing author on quote into pullquote conversion
- fix touch events outside bubble in rich message
- close keyboard on scrolling away from focused text field
- fix message width of via bot rich message
- fix checkbox drawing in rtl
- clip contents of details block in rich message
- fix selection of text inside table in rich message, magnifier position
- fix applying emojis in table cells when opening editor
- copy rich message button in message menu
- preview of page blocks in chatlist/reply
- selection and cursor handle fixes: select all button in custom menu, fix showing menu after deselect, deselect moves caret into a tap, fix scrolling on moving selection handle
- show cursor handle when pressed a bit on right side of text (conflicted with dragging blocks), paste menu more accessible on empty text block
- experimental: support pressing on checkbox to edit in message bubble
